'''dhabaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huanghuali|huanghuali]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huanghuali|huanghuali]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhabaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbæhæth|dhæbæhæth]] || [[word:dhæbæhæj|dhæbæhæj]] || [[word:dhæbæhæsh|dhæbæhæsh]] || [[word:dhæbæhæ|dhæbæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhababahath|dhababahath]] || [[word:dhababahaj|dhababahaj]] || [[word:dhababahash|dhababahash]] || [[word:dhababaha|dhababaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhabahath|dhabahath]] || [[word:dhabahaj|dhabahaj]] || [[word:dhabahash|dhabahash]] || [[word:dhabaha|dhabaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabafhath|dhabafhath]] || [[word:dhabafhaj|dhabafhaj]] || [[word:dhabafhash|dhabafhash]] || [[word:dhabafhaf|dhabafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhabahatha|dhabahatha]] || [[word:dhabahaja|dhabahaja]] || [[word:dhabahasha|dhabahasha]] || [[word:dhabahaka|dhabahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhabahath|dhabahath]] || [[word:dhabahaj|dhabahaj]] || [[word:dhabahash|dhabahash]] || [[word:dhabaha|dhabaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhabahathal|dhabahathal]] || [[word:dhabahajal|dhabahajal]] || [[word:dhabahashal|dhabahashal]] || [[word:dhabahakal|dhabahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhabahathatha|dhabahathatha]] || [[word:dhabahajaja|dhabahajaja]] || [[word:dhabahashasha|dhabahashasha]] || [[word:dhabahaka|dhabahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhabahathan|dhabahathan]] || [[word:dhabahajan|dhabahajan]] || [[word:dhabahashan|dhabahashan]] || [[word:dhabahakan|dhabahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhabahathaoro|dhabahathaoro]] || [[word:dhabahajaoro|dhabahajaoro]] || [[word:dhabahashaoro|dhabahashaoro]] || [[word:dhabahakaoro|dhabahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
